title: ObservLib Security Audit Remediation
description: Comprehensive security hardening based on full security audit findings. Addresses 4 CRITICAL, 5 HIGH, and 5 MEDIUM severity vulnerabilities across cryptographic transport, resource exhaustion, injection attacks, and access control.
acceptance_criteria: mix deps.audit shows zero HIGH/CRITICAL CVEs

title: Phase 1: Critical Security Fixes
description: Remediate 4 CRITICAL severity findings: TLS configuration, atom table exhaustion, unbounded ETS memory, and unbounded log queues. These must be fixed before production deployment.

title: C-01: Implement TLS Configuration for External HTTP Communications
description: Add TLS configuration options for all outbound HTTP connections (OTLP exporters, Pyroscope). Create lib/observlib/http.ex module with TLS defaults, certificate validation, and custom CA support.
acceptance: Plaintext to remote hosts produces warning

title: C-02: Fix Atom Table Exhaustion via User-Controlled Metric Names
description: Replace String.to_atom/1 with safe alternatives in lib/observlib/metrics.ex:323 and lib/observlib/telemetry.ex:253. Use String.to_existing_atom/1 or maintain a bounded atom registry.
acceptance: Property test with 1M unique metric names doesn't crash VM
All String.to_atom/1 on user input replaced

title: C-03: Add Metric Cardinality Limits (Unbounded ETS)
description: Implement configurable max cardinality per metric in MeterProvider. When limit hit, drop oldest entries with warning. Add cardinality_limit config option (default: 2000).

title: C-04: Add Log Batch Queue Size Limit
description: Implement max_batch_size limit in OtlpLogsExporter. When limit hit, drop oldest logs with warning. Add log_batch_limit config (default: 1000).
acceptance: Test verifies bounded memory during collector downtime

title: Phase 2: High-Priority Security Fixes
description: Remediate 5 HIGH severity findings: OTLP header leakage, ETS access control, blocking retry logic, unauthenticated Prometheus endpoint, and URL validation.

title: H-01: Prevent OTLP Headers Leak in Error Logs
description: Implement header redaction in all error logging paths. Create redact_sensitive_data/1 function that removes Authorization, X-API-Key, and other sensitive headers before inspect().
acceptance: Authorization headers never appear in logs
Test with Bearer token verifies redaction
Error context preserved without sensitive data

title: H-02: Change ETS Tables to :protected Access
description: Change 4 ETS tables from :public to :protected. Update meter_provider.ex:130,137, provider.ex:152, pyroscope_processor.ex:127. Verify no external reads break.
acceptance: Test verifies only owner can write

title: H-03: Remove Process.sleep from GenServer Callbacks
description: Refactor retry logic in exporters to use Process.send_after instead of Process.sleep. Update otlp_logs_exporter.ex:242,251 and otlp_metrics_exporter.ex:254.

title: H-04: Add Authentication/Rate Limiting to Prometheus Endpoint
description: Add connection limit, rate limiting, and optional basic auth to PrometheusReader TCP server. Implement at prometheus_reader.ex:73-81,149-163.

title: H-05: Add URL Validation for OTLP Endpoints
description: Validate endpoint URLs in config.ex and runtime.exs. Reject non-HTTP schemes, URLs with user info, and potential SSRF targets. Add validation to lib/observlib/http.ex.
acceptance: Clear error messages for invalid URLs

title: Phase 3: Medium-Priority Security Fixes
description: Remediate 5 MEDIUM severity findings: attribute size limits, sensitive attribute redaction, runtime input validation, span limits, and Prometheus label injection.

title: M-01: Add Attribute Value Size Limits
description: Implement max attribute value size and max attribute count per span/metric/log. Create lib/observlib/attributes.ex with validation. Default: 4KB per value, 128 attributes max.
acceptance: Values exceeding limit truncated with suffix

title: M-02: Implement Sensitive Attribute Redaction
description: Add sensitive_attributes config list and redaction logic before OTLP export. Redact password, credit_card, ssn, api_key, etc. in lib/observlib/attributes.ex.

title: M-03: Add Input Validation in runtime.exs
description: Add error handling for String.to_integer and other parsing in config/runtime.exs:9-15. Handle malformed environment variables gracefully with clear error messages.
acceptance: Clear error message for invalid numbers

title: M-04: Add Max Active Span Limit
description: Implement max_active_spans limit in Traces.Provider. When limit hit, reject new span creation with warning. Default: 10000 spans.
acceptance: New spans rejected when limit hit

title: M-05: Enhanced Prometheus Label Injection Prevention
description: Improve escape_label_value/1 in prometheus_reader.ex:355-360 to escape \r, \0, and all control characters. Add comprehensive injection test cases.
acceptance: Property test with random control chars

title: Phase 4: Security Testing and Validation
description: Comprehensive security test suite, static analysis validation, dependency audit, and security documentation. Ensures all fixes are properly tested and documented.

title: Security Test Suite Implementation
description: Create comprehensive security test suite with property-based tests, injection tests, fuzzing, and regression tests for all findings. 8 new test files covering all security domains.
acceptance: Injection test suite covers all vectors

title: Static Analysis Validation
description: Run and pass mix credo --strict, mix dialyzer, and verify all security findings resolved. Update .dialyzer_ignore if needed for legitimate warnings.

title: Dependency Security Audit
description: Run mix deps.audit, update vulnerable dependencies, review transitive deps. Document any accepted risks for unfixable CVEs.

title: Security Documentation
description: Create comprehensive security documentation: SECURITY.md, security guide in docs/book/security/, update configuration docs, add security considerations to README.
